criteria.criterion: Lighthouse performance score >= 70 measured on the production Vercel URL
Lighthouse accessibility score >= 90 with all critical axe-core violations resolved
Lighthouse SEO score >= 85 with meta description and title tag verified
Security headers present: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Content-Security-Policy
No broken links detected by link integrity checker (all internal links return 2xx or 3xx)
Privacy Policy references specific data types collected by the app (not generic template placeholders)
Privacy Policy includes the actual app name and company name (no 'YOUR_APP_NAME' or 'YOUR_COMPANY' placeholders)
Data retention period is specified with a concrete timeframe (e.g., '30 days', 'until account deletion')
Contact information for privacy inquiries is provided with a real email address or contact form URL
Terms of Service references the specific features and functionality of the deployed app
Terms of Service includes the actual app name and company name (no template placeholders)
Governing law and jurisdiction are specified (e.g., 'Laws of the State of California, USA')
User account termination conditions are explicitly listed with at least 3 specific grounds
